item.title: Mel Brooks didn't warn Steve Weber about how much blood was going to erupt in this scene from "Dracula: Dead and Loving It" (1995)
item.description: This is the first take of it too, you can see Weber struggling not to laugh and break the scene.

item.title: Take The Oil Said Trump At 9AM. We Have Your Pilot Said Iran At 3PM. The Same Day. April 3 2026.
item.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E Strike Eagle. The pilot didn't eject safely. Iran claims they have the crew. The US scrambled a rescue operation. A Black Hawk was shot down during the rescue attempt. Multiple aircraft lost in a single operation. The US is publicly denying ALL OF IT. ??✈️ This morning Trump said "take the oil and make a fortune." This afternoon Iran announced they have an American prisoner of war. THE SAME DAY. March 31 he was willing to end the war. April 3 he said take the oil. April 3 an American pilot was captured on Iranian soil. THE SAME FUCKING DAY. ?️⚰️? The last time Iran held Americans hostage was 1979. 444 days. It destroyed Carter's entire presidency. A POW is not just a tragedy. A POW is leverage. Iran now holds a card nobody can take from them. And if that pilot appears on Iranian state television the political fallout will be unlike anything we've seen. ??? Over 100 legal experts called the strikes potential war crimes today. A US servicemember is now in Iranian custody. The Army Chief of Staff was fired this morning. The rescue helicopter was shot down. The US is denying everything. This is not a footnote. This is the fucking story. ????️ #F15E #AmericanPOW #IranWar #ShotDown #BlackHawkDown #TakeTheOil #444Days #WarCrimes #ThisIsTheStory #GodHelpThePilot
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Childlike wonder in his eyes, so great to see
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: Deviousness Day 163
item.description:
going to try to finish deviousness serious off with random posting. plus in honor of my borthday this week. i dunno. anyway. more memes. enjoy!
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 my birthday is this week yay. know previously people have giftied me some stuffs via throne, steam, ko-fi (fees tho ugh), and cashapp from people appreciating what I do with memes here, the discord things and/or just for fun of my birthday towards things. rn id accept cashapp or! united miles. cause have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milage they dont use/want since i know there are business like people who have travel for the business things that their work pays for and have seen it around on imgur. if anyone wants to gift me some miles for future travel things lemme know. id take some miles. cause. miles. united just changed their earn rates so just when im starting to travel they have made it more painful for those of us that cant qualify for their cards to earn and do like. award flights or upgrades on 15 hour flights with miles things. Mind you I am in no way begging or expecting things. and also know people have gifted me things in the past so if you want to please poke me via dm here or discord since I would like to direct that occasional generosity I have received from people towards things I could use since I dont game much anymore and not doing throne again since planning on moving at some point so trying to limit my physical stuff until that happens in the next few years. thanks! I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Watch fud porn. Cuz ain't nobody got time for that.
item.description:
Poh. Tay. Toh.
Maybe doing this with some real sausages instead of whatever those frickin things are...
Now....destroy it with your mouth hole....
birbs
must add this to my horny foldder.
Confused....are the doritos still in there?
Poh. Tay . Toh.
How come when I do it it turns into a frag grenade?
Neat.
School bell rings. Get your fud education on.
Those look goooooood.
LNI somewhere.
Best family recipe ever.
"Sweet Brown" tax.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @chronicjoker did this sketch. She's lovely. Check out their posts for more.
27 Man Tax: Donald Faison
“Just sit a while and think. Never be afraid to sit a while and think.” - Lorraine Hansberry So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: GovBrief Today #427
item.description: Donald Trump's criminal defense attorney is now running the Justice Department, and his first act was to kill the law his client was charged under. Todd Blanche defended Trump through two federal prosecutions, including the classified documents case built on the Presidential Records Act. Trump announced today that he had fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, and Blanche, the man who sat next to him when the charges were read, stepped into her role. Trump ally and FBI director Kash Patel spent the winter firing every FBI agent who touched that investigation. The prosecutors who built the case were gone before that. Within hours, Blanche's Justice Department released an opinion declaring the law behind those charges unconstitutional. Trump and Blanche had reason to be nervous. Special counsel Jack Smith testified to Congress in January that he had proof beyond a reasonable doubt. Three months later, every person who built that case is gone, and the law it rested on has been erased by the lawyer who fought it. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand they block any permanent attorney general nominee who won't commit to enforcing the Presidential Records Act. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 427 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260402-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-springsteen [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr02 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/artemis-leaves-orbit [4] https://go.govbrief.today/drug-tariffs [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-generals [6] https://go.govbrief.today/military-personal-weapons [7] https://go.govbrief.today/pra-unconstitutional [8] https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-fired [9] https://go.govbrief.today/peters-sentence [10] https://go.govbrief.today/states-sued-prediction [11] https://go.govbrief.today/detention-facility-cited [12] https://go.govbrief.today/sarsour-detained [13] https://go.govbrief.today/bortac-violence [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-ncpc [15] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-house-bill [16] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-drones Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: The USA needs to be smarter with terminating Presidents.
item.description: Trump is mentored by PUTIN, and influenced by those global tyrants, which is unacceptable. However there may be a murdering genocidal Marxist-Mussolini one day that will be too hard to get rid of. The precedence has been made by Trump, so prepare and plan now.

item.title: Mini dump of 15 vids Friday Fun
item.description:
Some old, some new, some borrowed, some blue.
I hope you enjoy your Friday and the ups and downs that may come of your weekend. Be safe in your travels and find some time to enjoy for those of us working!

item.title: As a man, yes.
item.description: EDIT: Friday Frontpage! Thank you very much Imgurians! I make reviews as a hobby, and this week I reviewed "Last Action Hero", one of the greatest bombs of the 90's, yet somehow considered one of the best movies of that era!
